aboutNana.title: Meet Nana Gviniashvili
aboutNana.subtitle: Owner & Medical Aesthetic Practitioner
aboutNana.bio: Nana Gviniashvili is the owner and sole practitioner at Silk Beauty Salon. With extensive training in medical aesthetics and facial dermatology, she specializes in Botox, dermal fillers, and advanced skin treatments. Nana is known for her natural-looking results, meticulous attention to detail, and personalized approach to each client.
aboutNana.qualification4: Member of Georgian Aesthetic Medicine Association

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions from international clients
faq.q1: Is it safe to have treatments while traveling?
faq.a1: Yes, many treatments have minimal downtime. We provide detailed aftercare instructions and are available for follow-up support via WhatsApp or video call.
faq.a2: Nana speaks Georgian, English, and Russian fluently, ensuring clear communication with international clients.
faq.q3: How do I book before arriving?
faq.a3: Contact us via WhatsApp for a free virtual consultation. We'll discuss your goals, provide a quote, and schedule your appointment.
faq.q4: Can I have treatment the day before a flight?
faq.a4: Botox treatments are fine for same-day travel. For fillers, we recommend 24-48 hours before flying to allow swelling to subside.
faq.q5: What if I have a reaction after I return home?
faq.a5: We provide 24/7 emergency contact and offer virtual follow-up consultations. For dermal fillers, we can provide guidance to local practitioners if needed.
faq.a6: Absolutely. We use only Allergan (Juvederm), Galderma (Restylane), and Merz products. You can see the packaging and lot numbers during your treatment.
faq.q7: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a7: We accept cash (GEL, USD, EUR), Visa, Mastercard, and contactless payments including Apple Pay and Google Pay.
faq.a8: Yes, we offer complimentary virtual follow-up consultations for all international clients at 2 weeks post-treatment.

anti-wrinkle.howItWorks: Botulinum toxin is injected into specific facial muscles using a fine needle. The toxin blocks nerve signals to these muscles, preventing them from contracting and creating wrinkles.
anti-wrinkle.aftercare: Avoid lying down for 4 hours, avoid exercise for 24 hours, and avoid rubbing the treated area.

tear-fill.name: Tear Fillers
tear-fill.shortDescription: Reduce the appearance of under-eye hollows and dark circles.
tear-fill.description: Tear filler treatment addresses under-eye hollows and dark circles for a more refreshed appearance.

nose-fillers.name: Non-Surgical Rhinoplasty
nose-fillers.shortDescription: Reshape your nose without surgery using dermal fillers.
nose-fillers.description: Non-surgical rhinoplasty uses dermal fillers to reshape and contour the nose.

temple-fillers.name: Temple Fillers
temple-fillers.shortDescription: Restore volume to the temples for a more youthful appearance.
temple-fillers.description: Temple fillers restore volume to the temporal area, creating a more balanced and youthful appearance.

hand-fillers.name: Hand Fillers
hand-fillers.shortDescription: Rejuvenate aging hands with volume restoration.
hand-fillers.description: Hand fillers restore volume to the hands, reducing the appearance of veins and tendons.

prp-therapy.name: PRP Facial
prp-therapy.shortDescription: Rejuvenate your skin using your body's own growth factors.
prp-therapy.description: PRP therapy uses your own blood platelets to rejuvenate and refresh your skin.

laser-hair.name: Laser Hair Removal
laser-hair.shortDescription: Permanent hair reduction for smooth, hair-free skin.
laser-hair.description: Laser hair removal provides long-lasting hair reduction for smooth skin.

laser-vein.name: Laser Vein Removal
laser-vein.shortDescription: Remove unwanted veins and spider veins.
laser-vein.description: Laser vein removal safely eliminates unwanted veins on the face and body.

labia-filler.name: Labia Filler
labia-filler.shortDescription: Enhance comfort and aesthetics with labial filler treatment.
labia-filler.description: Labia filler treatment addresses cosmetic concerns and improves comfort.

faq.title: Booking FAQs
faq.a1: Initial consultations typically last 30-45 minutes, allowing time for a thorough assessment and discussion of your goals.
faq.a2: A 20% deposit is required to secure your appointment, which is deducted from your treatment cost.
faq.a3: We require 48 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations may forfeit the deposit.
